untranslatable_reason: Signal requires detection of limit orders on the book (order book microstructure data: 'limit order sits >20s', 'limit order price deviation', 'order size percentile', 'limit order cancellation'). These require order book state and real-time order tracking, not available in standard OHLCV/technical indicator set. Additionally, 'well-informed traders' identification requires information asymmetry detection beyond technical indicators. Signal is fundamentally a market microstructure play requiring Level 2+ data.
translation_notes: Attempted approximation using volatility expansion (hvol_20), volume anomaly (vol_ratio_20), price deviation from MA (close vs sma_20), and returns-based profit target (25 bps ≈ 0.25%). However, core logic—identifying stale limit orders and avoiding informed traders—cannot be translated to technical indicators alone. Requires order book, order duration tracking, and order cancellation events.
